purpose: Field-survival contract for launch scraper provenance so source-backed truth metadata survives fetch -> parse -> validate -> stage.

familyContracts.sourceIdentityRule: Use finalUrl when present, otherwise sourceUrl, and persist it as source_url.
familyContracts.stateRule: parsed stateId must survive into staged state_id.

familyContracts.sourceIdentityRule: Use finalUrl when present, otherwise sourceUrl, and duplicate it into official_source_url.
familyContracts.stateRule: parsed stateId must survive into staged state_id.

familyContracts.sourceIdentityRule: Use finalUrl when present, otherwise sourceUrl, and duplicate it into official_source_url.
familyContracts.stateRule: parsed stateId must survive into staged state_id.

familyContracts.sourceIdentityRule: Use finalUrl when present, otherwise sourceUrl, and keep it as both source_url and estimate_source_url for waitlist provenance.
familyContracts.stateRule: parsed stateId must survive into staged state_id and program_id inference must not overwrite state provenance.

familyContracts.sourceIdentityRule: Use finalUrl when present, otherwise sourceUrl, and persist it as source_url.
familyContracts.stateRule: parsed stateId must survive into staged state_id.

familyContracts.sourceIdentityRule: Use finalUrl when present, otherwise sourceUrl, and persist it as source_url.
familyContracts.stateRule: parsed stateId must survive into staged state_id for either education table.

familyContracts.sourceIdentityRule: Use finalUrl when present, otherwise sourceUrl, and persist it as source_url.
familyContracts.stateRule: parsed stateId must survive into staged state_id.

familyContracts.sourceIdentityRule: Use finalUrl when present, otherwise sourceUrl, and keep officialDownloadUrl separately as official_download_url.
familyContracts.stateRule: parsed stateId must survive into staged state_id.

familyContracts.sourceIdentityRule: Use finalUrl when present, otherwise sourceUrl, and keep canonicalKnowledgeUrl separately as canonical_url.
familyContracts.stateRule: parsed stateId must survive into staged state_id.

invariants: Every parsed record must keep sourceUrl, finalUrl, stateId, gapFamily, targetTable, and savedPath.
Every validated record must preserve the full parsed record and add validationStatus plus validationReasons.
Every staged row must keep a traceable source_url, source_name, source_type, scraped_at, state_id, confidence_score, extraction_notes, and raw_text_excerpt.
finalUrl may replace sourceUrl as the staged source_url, but provenance must remain traceable to the fetched page.
Every launch family now has a direct staging-table mapping, even when downstream promotion remains family-specific.
